payload.author: claude
payload.body: Resolved as metadata-only per bri. SPEC § Activation reframed into 3 tiers (advisory/project/per-file), metadata-primary, #![strict] explicitly flagged as not stock-valid. Metadata code path already shipped in RT-81; advisory zero-activation tier is RT-101. The user-facing version lands in the README rewrite (RT-103). No new per-file marker added (register_tool is nightly; comment-marker was declined in favor of the simpler metadata story).
